chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 194 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.950/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 25-03-2025 Mr. Shahroz, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Ishaque, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, advocate for respondent department. Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel for the respondent department the assessment has already taken place and while the petitioner remained at liberty to assail the same in the statutory hierarchy. No case is made out to perpetuate this case in the writ jurisdiction. Mr. Shahroz, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Ishaque, advocate for the petitioner has no instructions. The petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
